dungeon: (LAVA/FIRE ABYSS DUNGEON run) ROTF — Archdemon Malphas's domain; recovered his fuller taunt set

A focused run through a LAVA/FIRE brick dungeon (orange/red lava-brick rooms, white bullet-hell); minimap shows a red/orange branching dungeon. Boss = Archdemon Malphas (taunts captured). 0 transitions = single continuous dungeon, name not printed.
map: DOCUMENTED: a LAVA/FIRE 'abyss'-style dungeon — orange/red lava-brick rooms + black-checkered floors, branching layout (per minimap). Grey-stone entrance at the start. Heavy white-bullet patterns (rings, diamonds).

bosses.name: Archdemon Malphas
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM (boss-colored chat). Malphas is the BOSS of this lava/fire abyss dungeon. Combined with disc_LS16CHnxyhU, his full taunt set: 'Kill my prote[ges]...' + 'I have been [released]...' (intro/awaken), 'You will regret...', 'My minions will slay you...' / 'My minions are...' (mid/summon), 'I have been defeated...' (ON-DEATH). A demon minion-commander (Malphas = an Ars Goetia demon).

confidence: HIGH for Archdemon Malphas as the boss + his taunt arc (verbatim across 2 videos) + the lava/fire biome + the Lucky-variant + potion-inventory lines. LOW for the dungeon's exact name and drops.
